package.title: TRAGUIN Premium Assam Tour Package for Senior Citizens — Leisure Kaziranga: Guwahati • Kaziranga National Park

highlights.text: Serial code AS-010 | TRAGUIN tour code TG-AS-010-LEISURE
State / Country: Assam, India | Category: Senior Citizen Leisure Tour
Destinations Covered: Guwahati • Kaziranga National Park
Ideal for: Senior Citizens, Families, Nature Lovers
Vehicle: Private luxury AC Toyota Innova Crysta with patient destination-trained chauffeur | Meal Plan: MAPAI
Route Plan: Guwahati ➔ Kaziranga (3N) ➔ Guwahati (2N) ➔ Departure
TRAGUIN Welcome Note: Dedicated ground handler support and VIP fast-track coordination at historic temples.
Curated by TRAGUIN Experts: Hand-vetted transit routes and properties ensuring comfortable mobility.
Personalized Assistance: Dedicated local ground coordinators available around the clock.
Shopping: Muga and Eri silks, organic tea from Upper Assam, cane baskets and bamboo decor.
Important Notes: Share dietary needs 14 days ahead; safari seating for back concerns; light shawls Nov–Feb.

itinerary.title: TRAGUIN Premium Assam Tour Package for Senior Citizens — Leisure Kaziranga: Guwahati • Kaziranga National Park
itinerary.tagline: Senior Citizen Leisure • Guwahati • Kaziranga • 05 Nights / 06 Days
itinerary.overview:
Deeply therapeutic journey through the green heart of Northeast India optimized for senior citizens with leisurely rhythm and premier luxury safety.

TOUR OVERVIEW\nLeisure Assam Holiday avoiding strenuous journeys with low-step vehicles, elevator-access hotels, and light cultural strolls. Route: Guwahati ➔ Kaziranga (3N) ➔ Guwahati (2N).

WHY CHOOSE THIS PREMIUM ASSAM EXPERIENCE?\nSpiritual Kamakhya VIP, comfortable jeep safaris for rhino viewing, orchid gardens, tea plantations, and TRAGUIN elimination of long waiting lines.
itinerary.seo_title: AS-010 | Senior Citizen Leisure Kaziranga | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05 Nights / 06 Days senior citizen Assam package (AS-010 / TG-AS-010-LEISURE): gentle Kaziranga safaris, orchid park, Brahmaputra cruise, Kamakhya VIP, 4-tier hotels.

highlights.text: Arrival and smooth highway drive to Kaziranga Day 01
Comfortable Western Range jeep safari Day 02
Orchid garden ambles and cultural weaving tales Day 03
Return to Guwahati with Brahmaputra sunset cruise Day 04
VIP Kamakhya darshan and Kalakshetra cultural museum Day 05

days.title: ARRIVAL IN GUWAHATI | DRIVE THROUGH FLOATING MIST TO KAZIRANGA
days.description: TRAGUIN airport coordinator receives you at arrival gate. Smooth flat highway journey past paddy fields with premium highway tea stop to handpicked Kaziranga luxury resort.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Scenic highway drive, welcoming resort orientation.
Evening Experience: Relaxing evening by the resort fireplace with local light music.
Overnight Stay: Handpicked Luxury Resort in Kaziranga.
Meals Included: Premium Dinner.

days.title: KAZIRANGA JEEP SAFARI | CHRONICLES OF THE ONE-HORNED RHINO
days.description: Relaxed breakfast then comfortable open-top private Jeep Safari in Western Range with expert naturalist viewing rhinos, buffaloes, and swamp deer without strenuous walking.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Kaziranga Western Range Private Safari.
Optional Activities: Short bird-watching session from the resort balcony.
Overnight Stay: Handpicked Luxury Resort in Kaziranga.
Meals Included: Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner.

days.title: ORCHID GARDEN AMBLES & CULTURAL WEAVING TALES
days.description: Slow-paced Kaziranga Orchid and Cultural Park with paved pathways, seated Bihu cultural presentation, and gentle neighboring tea estate walk.
activities: Sightseeing Included: National Orchid Park, Tea Garden walk.
Evening Experience: Local Assamese traditional cultural dance show.
Overnight Stay: Handpicked Luxury Resort in Kaziranga.
Meals Included: Breakfast & Gourmet Dinner.

days.title: KAZIRANGA TO GUWAHATI | SUNSET ON THE BRAHMAPUTRA
days.description: Peaceful breakfast, return to Guwahati ultra-premium hotel, and exclusive private sunset cruise on the majestic Brahmaputra with gentle breezes and light music.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Return road trip, Luxury River Cruise.
Evening Experience: Relaxing tea session on the cruise ship deck.
Overnight Stay: Luxury Hotel in Guwahati.
Meals Included: Breakfast & Elegant Dinner.

days.title: SPIRITUAL SOLACE | VIP KAMAKHYA DARSHAN & HERITAGE MUSEUM
days.description: Seamless fast-track VIP Kamakhya Temple visit with minimized walking. Afternoon Srimanta Sankaradeva Kalakshetra open-air museum and light silk souvenir shopping.
activities: Sightseeing Included: VIP Kamakhya Temple, Kalakshetra Cultural Centre.
Photography Points: Scenic hill views overlooking the Guwahati cityscape.
Overnight Stay: Luxury Hotel in Guwahati.
Meals Included: Breakfast & Farewell Dinner.

days.title: DEPARTURE | EVERLASTING FAMILY MEMORIES
days.description: Final luxury breakfast and comfortable private transfer to Guwahati International Airport.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private airport transfer.
Meals Included: Full Buffet Breakfast.

hotels.name: Infinity Resort / Borgos Resort (Executive) | Kiranshree Grand / Hotel Shoolin Grand
hotels.description: OPTION 01 – DELUXE: Infinity Resort / Borgos Resort Executive (Kaziranga, 3N) | Kiranshree Grand / Shoolin Grand (Guwahati, 2N) | Breakfast & Dinner (MAP)

hotels.name: Diphlu River Lodge (Standard Cottage) | Novotel Guwahati GS Road
hotels.description: OPTION 02 – PREMIUM: Diphlu River Lodge Standard Cottage (Kaziranga, 3N) | Novotel Guwahati GS Road (Guwahati, 2N) | Breakfast & Dinner (MAP)

hotels.name: Borgos Resort (Luxury Suite Tier) | Radisson Blu Hotel Guwahati
hotels.description: OPTION 03 – LUXURY: Borgos Resort Luxury Suite (Kaziranga, 3N) | Radisson Blu Hotel Guwahati (Guwahati, 2N) | Gourmet Inclusive MAP

hotels.name: Diphlu River Lodge (Premium River Villa) | Vivanta Guwahati (Taj Group Heritage)
hotels.description: OPTION 04 – ULTRA LUXURY: Diphlu River Lodge Premium River Villa (Kaziranga, 3N) | Vivanta Guwahati Taj Group (Guwahati, 2N) | Bespoke Chef MAP Plan

inclusions.text: Premium Stays: 5 Nights accommodation at top-rated hotels featuring elevator access and senior-friendly room designs.
Luxury Transportation: Private air-conditioned Toyota Innova Crysta for all transfers and sightseeing.
Curated Dining: 5 comprehensive breakfasts and 5 mild, freshly prepared dinners suited to guest preferences.
TRAGUIN Welcome Amenities: Assamese Gamosa greeting, daily packaged water bottles, and premium tea sampler kit.
Exclusive Experiences: Private Brahmaputra Sunset Cruise and fast-track VIP entry coordination at Kamakhya Temple.
Dedicated Assistance: On-ground passenger assistance and luggage handling by TRAGUIN team members.
All Applicable Taxes: Comprehensive toll fees, parking, driver allowances, and state taxes included.
Air / Train Tickets: Airfare or railway tickets to and from Guwahati.
Personal Expenses: Laundry service, room telephone calls, and premium alcoholic beverages.
Optional Extras: Camera fees, individual monument entry tickets, and tips for local guides.
Medical Insurance: Travel and medical insurance coverage.
